title: Meta_Kim Skills Manifest
description: Shared configuration for third-party skill repositories installed by Meta_Kim

skillOwner.description: Default GitHub owner/organization for skill repositories (can be overridden via META_KIM_SKILL_OWNER env var)

skills.description: List of third-party skill repositories to install

id.description: Unique identifier for the skill (used as directory name)

repo.description: GitHub repository path (owner/repo or full URL). Can use ${skillOwner} placeholder.

subdir.description: Static subdirectory path where the skill is located

installRoot.description: Primary deploy folder under each runtime home (default: skills). Rare: use plugins when the canonical tree must live under plugins/; then a skills/<id> symlink/junction is created for discovery. Prefer pluginHookCompat when upstream hooks expect plugins/ but the canonical tree should stay in skills/.

pluginHookCompat.description: When true: deploy to skills/<id>/ (default), then create plugins/<id> as symlink/junction to skills/<id> so upstream Stop hooks that default to ~/.{runtime}/plugins/{id}/ still resolve. Do not combine with installRoot: plugins.

claudePlugin.description: Claude Code marketplace plugin identifier if this skill is also an official plugin

defaultSelected.description: If false, setup does not pre-select this repo in the dependency multi-select (default: true)

installMethod.description: How this skill is installed on target platforms. pluginMarketplace=Claude Code plugin marketplace; gitClone=plain git clone; gitCloneInstallScript=git clone then run setup script; subdirExtraction=git clone with subdir extraction; manual=copy files manually per README

legacyNames.description: Previous directory names for this skill that should be removed when installing the current version. Used to clean up renamed skills (e.g. find-skills -> findskill).

targets.description: Which runtimes this skill applies to. If omitted, applies to all runtimes.

hookSubdirs.description: Per-runtime subdirectories within the repo that contain hook files to deploy to the runtime's hooks/ directory.

hookConfigFiles.description: Per-runtime hook config files within the repo to deploy alongside hooks.

hookExtraFiles.description: Per-runtime extra files to deploy alongside hooks (e.g. templates). Each entry is { src, dest } where dest is relative to runtimeHome.

hookSettingsMerge.description: Per-runtime hook settings to merge into the runtime's settings.json. Registers a hook command pointing to the deployed hookFile.

hookFile.description: Filename of the deployed hook script (must exist in hooks/)

externalUrls.description: External URLs referenced in Meta_Kim (for centralized management)
